author: Deliciously Ella
title: Simple Tomato & Basil Orzo
ingredients: 1 x 14 fl oz tin coconut milk
pinch of sea salt & black pepper
1 x 14 fl oz tin coconut milk
pinch of sea salt & black pepper

instructions:
Warm a large frying pan set over a medium heat, then add the olive oil. Add the shallots and cook for 5 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the garlic and cherry tomatoes, and cook for 2 minutes, before pouring in the orzo, stock, tinned tomatoes and coconut milk. Gently break the plum tomatoes up with the back of a wooden spoon, then bring the mixture to the boil, then reduce to a simmer and cook for 15–17 minutes. The orzo should be cooked and the dish should feel deliciously creamy with any excess liquid absorbed.
Add the butter beans and let them warm through in the sauce for 2 minutes, then add the lemon zest and juice, maple syrup and basil for a final minute, before seasoning with lots of salt and pepper.

description: We know that our orzo recipes are a huge hit with our community, so we wanted to share this Tomato & Basil Orzo from Healthy Made Simple. This simple, family staple comes together in no time and without any fuss. Orzo recipes are a brilliant swap for a risotto — they’ve got that same creamy texture but are much quicker to make.
